title: Job Openings at ABNL Limited
content:
ABNL Limited was incorporated in 1992 as an Oil and Gas servicing company with a vision to provide professional engineering and technical services to the Oil and Gas exploration and production companies in Nigeria and the West African sub-region. Since its incorporation, the company has grown in leaps and bounds, expanding its business horizon, but still within the Oil and Gas sector.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



ABNL is a 100% owned indigenous firm, with a shareholding in excess of 100 million Naira. Its' directors are individuals of proven integrity, who over the years have acquired the requisite experience in the Oil and Gas business, as well as in the banking and finance sector. The integrity of the directors and the staff of the company have been a priceless contributive factor in the growth and wellbeing of the company.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Operations - Field Operator III

Job Location: Yoho Platform, Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Contract

Job Description


	Operate equipment and wells by applying operating and safety procedures and guidelines to meet the daily operational plan, reduce equipment failure, and efficiently manage resource administration.


Tasks and Responsibilities


	Responsible for implementing daily work objectives, housekeeping, safety, health, environmental, and security.
	Active participation in daily toolbox meetings and regular, reported safety meetings.
	Identify and implement corrective and optimization actions through continuous surveillance of wells and equipment to ensure reliable, efficient, and safe operational conditions.
	Function as Equipment Care Technician, and routinely use Maintenance skills in performing simple maintenance activities.
	Report when the alarm, emergency, or emergency shutdown system is out of service.
	Provide detailed, clear, and accurate information when changing shifts to guarantee that unit conditions are updated and ensure operational continuity.
	Coordinate, control, and monitor maintenance jobs according to the corrective, predictive, and preventive planning.
	Report continuously in the log book all relevant operational events, abnormal situations, or deviation occurred in the work area, equipment, or personnel.
	Take samples of products for laboratory analysis and execute field laboratory tests.
	Active participation in emergency response activities.
	Report incidents internally and escalate awareness as per the Incident Reporting Guidelines.
	Ensure that the Operations Shift Supervisor is informed and consulted about operations activities.
	Ensure good communication across the work team so that issues/actions can be adequately addressed.
	Provide the basic facts concerning well-producing problems, current production rates, and the current condition of the well.
	Ensure that the well problem diagnostics are thorough and complete before requesting Well Work intervention operations.
	Ensure that the wellhead and well surface equipment are maintained and are in good working order prior to Wellwork operations taking over responsibility for the well for intervention operations.
	Provide assistance and support to the ongoing Wellwork operations as needed.


Skills and Qualifications


	Completed secondary education and worked previously as a Field Technician.
	Strong communications (oral & written).
	High standard of Safety, Health, Environment aptitude, and cultivates the same in others.
	Extensive knowledge and/or experience of pipeline operations.
	Extensive knowledge of safety and operations management tools and processes. 
	Strong knowledge of Emergency Preparedness Procedures. 
	Extensive knowledge of Project Philosophy and Design Specifications. 
	Knowledgeable of relevant regulations. 
	Knowledgeable of relevant commercial agreements.


Application Closing Date: 29th May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in MS Word format to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Engineering - Electrical Engineer III

Job Location: Seplat House, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Main Function


	Evaluate and comment on discipline engineering work performed both internally and by Contractors and subcontractors to ensure that work is being executed in accordance with Company specifications, Company standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Facilitates effective execution of discipline engineering and design routines that align with the team's goals, objectives, and procedures.
	Assures accurate and timely communication among the team and other company Functions on discipline engineering activities, progress, and issues. In addition to technical ability, they should demonstrate sound communication, facilitation, and interpersonal skills.


Tasks and Responsibilities


	Level 3 requires all tasks and responsibilities, plus skills and qualifications listed below.


Skills and Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related engineering specialty, or equivalent professional experience
	Extensive knowledge of discipline design standards, specifications, codes, and appropriate safety criteria
	Ability to adapt to tight deadlines, heavy workloads, and frequent changes in priorities
	Proficient in the Microsoft Office suite of software programs
	Read, write, and speak fluent English, especially as it applies to technical and business communications.


Application Closing Date: 29th May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in MS Word format to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Operations (Gen) - Aviation Dispatcher III

Job Location: Usari Platform, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Main Function


	Perform day-to-day aviation dispatch and passenger pre-flight services for inbound and outbound (fixed wing, helicopter) to ensure seamless transition for passengers and freight.
	his position might be described as an Aviation Dispatch Expert who, on top of level 1 and 2, can potentially supervise others, is expert in the field and have extensive experience in this area of work.


Tasks and Responsibilities


	Obtain weather report for the station of departure, destination and the alternative route before scheduled departure time.
	Obtain the daily manifest through the Personnel Tracking System (PTS) (passenger tracking system).
	Check-in passengers and their luggage according to priority and numbers on the manifest.
	Perform passenger identification per Company requirements.
	Complete the indemnity form (for required passengers).
	Allocate boarding passes to checked-in passengers • Prepare the out-flown manifest, weight and balance sheet for the flight.
	Complete the weather dispatch form.
	Brief the Pilots when the check-in process is complete and the aircraft is ready to depart.
	Collect the aircraft traffic from radio room to set the flight running through PTS.
	End the in-coming flight through PTS.
	File all flown manifests.
	Receive and dispatch aircraft.
	Send the PTS Aviation reports.


Skills and Qualifications


	Previous experience in a closely related position
	Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience acceptable to Company.
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.
	Ability to make sound and rapid decisions concerning safety, flight regulations, and the economy of operations.
	Extensive knowledge of aviation operations


Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in MS Word format to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Inventory Backend Manager Job at Whip Smart Service Providers Limited




        
    

        
        Whip-Smart Service Providers Limited is an HR Recruiting Firm, bridging the gap between job seekers and employers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Backend Manager

Job Location: Festac, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We're seeking an experienced Inventory Backend Manager to join our team.
	You'll be responsible for managing inventory, ensuring accurate stock levels, and providing excellent computer skills to support our operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage inventory levels, track stock movements, and optimize storage
	Use computer systems to update inventory records, generate reports, and analyze data
	Website management, including updates and maintenance
	Work on the Bumpa site to ensure seamless operations
	Provide technical support and troubleshooting for computer-related issues


Requirements


	Good computer knowledge and skills
	Experience with inventory management and backend operations
	Ability to work with computer systems and software


Ideal Candidate:


	You're detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working with computers.
	You have experience with inventory management and website updates.


Salary
N100,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Quality Control Manager - Garment Production",
  "description": "Apex Forte Professionals is a company specializing in providing recruitment and staffing solutions. Their primary objective is to connect highly skilled professionals with organizations that need their expertise, ensuring a good match between the candidates&#39; skills and the clients&#39; requirements. This involves a range of services, including talent acquisition, workforce management, and consulting to help businesses build effective teams and achieve their goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Manager - Garment Production

Job Location: Ilasa Maja-Oshodi Expressway, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	The Quality Control Manager will be responsible for overseeing the quality of finished garments, establishing and enforcing quality assurance processes across the factory, and ensuring production teams possess and maintain the necessary skills to meet quality standards.
	The role requires strong leadership, technical knowledge of garment construction, and a hands-on approach to quality improvement across all production stages.
	The QCM will be required to build a quality-driven culture across a small but fast-paced production facility, implement practical quality control systems, train production staff, and ensure that finished goods meet client specifications.
	In addition to monitoring quality on the sewing floor, the role includes setting up simple but effective processes and improving operator skills.


Performance Indicators


	Reduction in defect/rejection rates.
	Improved first-pass quality.
	Compliance with client quality standards and audit results
	Operator skill development and error reduction
	Adherence to SOPs and timely resolution of quality related issue.


Salary
N160,000 - N230,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method fo Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: apexforteprofs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Quality Control Manager - Garment Production Job at Apex Forte Professionals




        
    

        
        Apex Forte Professionals is a company specializing in providing recruitment and staffing solutions. Their primary objective is to connect highly skilled professionals with organizations that need their expertise, ensuring a good match between the candidates' skills and the clients' requirements. This involves a range of services, including talent acquisition, workforce management, and consulting to help businesses build effective teams and achieve their goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Manager - Garment Production

Job Location: Ilasa Maja-Oshodi Expressway, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Quality Control Manager will be responsible for overseeing the quality of finished garments, establishing and enforcing quality assurance processes across the factory, and ensuring production teams possess and maintain the necessary skills to meet quality standards.
	The role requires strong leadership, technical knowledge of garment construction, and a hands-on approach to quality improvement across all production stages.
	The QCM will be required to build a quality-driven culture across a small but fast-paced production facility, implement practical quality control systems, train production staff, and ensure that finished goods meet client specifications.
	In addition to monitoring quality on the sewing floor, the role includes setting up simple but effective processes and improving operator skills.


Performance Indicators


	Reduction in defect/rejection rates.
	Improved first-pass quality.
	Compliance with client quality standards and audit results
	Operator skill development and error reduction
	Adherence to SOPs and timely resolution of quality related issue.


Salary
N160,000 - N230,000 per month. 

Method fo Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Admin Officer",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and organized Admin Officer to oversee daily administrative operations and ensure efficient office management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for coordinating administrative activities, maintaining records, supporting internal teams, and ensuring smooth office processes to enhance organizational productivity.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day office administrative activities and operations.
	Maintain and organize company records, documents, and filing systems.
	Coordinate office supplies procurement and inventory management.
	Prepare reports, correspondence, and other administrative documentation.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and manage calendars where required.
	Support staff with administrative and operational needs.
	Ensure proper maintenance of office facilities and equipment.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and official communications.
	Assist with travel arrangements and logistics when necessary.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and administrative procedures.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in Business Administration, Management, Public Administration, or any related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of relevant administrative experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.


Required Skills:


	Administrative Management
	Time Management
	Communication Skills
	Record Keeping &amp; Documentation
	Attention to Detail
	Interpersonal Skills
	Organizational Skills


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruiter3@ascentech.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Admin Officer Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and organized Admin Officer to oversee daily administrative operations and ensure efficient office management.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for coordinating administrative activities, maintaining records, supporting internal teams, and ensuring smooth office processes to enhance organizational productivity.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day office administrative activities and operations.
	Maintain and organize company records, documents, and filing systems.
	Coordinate office supplies procurement and inventory management.
	Prepare reports, correspondence, and other administrative documentation.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and manage calendars where required.
	Support staff with administrative and operational needs.
	Ensure proper maintenance of office facilities and equipment.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and official communications.
	Assist with travel arrangements and logistics when necessary.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and administrative procedures.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in Business Administration, Management, Public Administration, or any related field.
	2–4 years of relevant administrative experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment.


Required Skills:


	Administrative Management
	Time Management
	Communication Skills
	Record Keeping & Documentation
	Attention to Detail
	Interpersonal Skills
	Organizational Skills


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Administrative Assistant / Brand & Media Communication Assistant",
  "description": "Brenhazy Limited is a privately owned Nigerian company incorporated in 2014 to provide Manpower Services, Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) services to companies in line with standard requirements and global best practices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant / Brand &amp; Media Communication Assistant
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	AAdministrative Assistant / Brand and Media Communications Assistant toprovideadministrative support while also assisting with the company&rsquo;s branding, media, and communication activities. The role combines office administration, communication management, content creation, social media management, and coordination of internal and external communications to ensure smooth operations and effective brand visibility.
	The ideal candidate should be organized, proactive, creative, and able to manage both administrative and communication-related responsibilities effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily office operations and administrative activities.
	Handle emails, and official correspondence professionally.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and maintain calendars.
	Maintain proper filing systems,documentationand company records.
	Coordinate communication between departments and external stakeholders.
	Assist in planning and executing branding and marketing campaigns.
	Create engaging content for social media, advertisements, and promotions.
	Write captionsand promotional materials.
	Monitor social media engagement and audience interactions.
	Conduct market and competitor research.
	Collaborate with management, sales, and creative teams.


Skills Required:


	Administrative &amp; Clerical Skills
	Communication Skills
	Organizational Skills
	Time Management
	Social Media Management
	Content Creation
	Digital Marketing Skills
	Brand Communication
	Customer Service Skills
	Microsoft Office Proficiency
	Interpersonal Skills
	Creativity &amp; Innovation
	Problem-Solving Skills
	Attention to Detail
	Team Collaboration
	Email &amp; Calendar Management.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@brenhazy.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative Assistant / Brand & Media Communication Assistant Job at Brenhazy Limited




        
    

        
        Brenhazy Limited is a privately owned Nigerian company incorporated in 2014 to provide Manpower Services, Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) services to companies in line with standard requirements and global best practices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant / Brand & Media Communication Assistant
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	AAdministrative Assistant / Brand and Media Communications Assistant toprovideadministrative support while also assisting with the company’s branding, media, and communication activities. The role combines office administration, communication management, content creation, social media management, and coordination of internal and external communications to ensure smooth operations and effective brand visibility.
	The ideal candidate should be organized, proactive, creative, and able to manage both administrative and communication-related responsibilities effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily office operations and administrative activities.
	Handle emails, and official correspondence professionally.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and maintain calendars.
	Maintain proper filing systems,documentationand company records.
	Coordinate communication between departments and external stakeholders.
	Assist in planning and executing branding and marketing campaigns.
	Create engaging content for social media, advertisements, and promotions.
	Write captionsand promotional materials.
	Monitor social media engagement and audience interactions.
	Conduct market and competitor research.
	Collaborate with management, sales, and creative teams.


Skills Required:


	Administrative & Clerical Skills
	Communication Skills
	Organizational Skills
	Time Management
	Social Media Management
	Content Creation
	Digital Marketing Skills
	Brand Communication
	Customer Service Skills
	Microsoft Office Proficiency
	Interpersonal Skills
	Creativity & Innovation
	Problem-Solving Skills
	Attention to Detail
	Team Collaboration
	Email & Calendar Management.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
